tool.name: oob_interaction_harness
tool.description: Prepare and manage an out-of-band callback harness for blind SSRF, XXE, RCE, SQLi, and similar validation workflows. Supports manual callback URLs and optional interactsh-backed polling.

parameter.name: action
parameter.description: One of: start, poll, record, list, doctor.

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: Logical target label for the assessment ledger. Required for start.

parameter.name: component
parameter.description: Component name for the assessment ledger. Required for start.

parameter.name: surface
parameter.description: Coverage surface being validated, such as "Avatar fetch SSRF". Required for start.

parameter.name: vulnerability_type
parameter.description: Blind vulnerability class, such as ssrf, xxe, rce, or sqli. Default: ssrf.

parameter.name: labels
parameter.description: Optional list of logical payload labels. A callback URL is generated for each label.

parameter.name: callback_base_url
parameter.description: Manual callback base URL to use instead of interactsh. When set, payloads are generated under this base URL and later observations should be recorded via the record action.

parameter.name: harness_id
parameter.description: Existing harness identifier. Required for poll and record actions.

parameter.name: interactions
parameter.description: Manual callback observations for the record action. Each item should include label and any available protocol, timestamp, remote_address, or raw event details.

parameter.name: interactsh_cli_path
parameter.description: Optional explicit path to interactsh-client if it is not on PATH.

parameter.name: interactsh_server
parameter.description: Optional interactsh server override for start and poll actions.

parameter.name: interactsh_token
parameter.description: Optional interactsh token when the selected server requires authentication.

parameter.name: wait_seconds
parameter.description: How long to wait during interactsh startup or polling. Default: 5.

parameter.name: poll_interval
parameter.description: Interactsh polling interval in seconds. Default: 5.
